data.title: Planet Labs secures 9-figure satellite deal from Sweden
data.description:
• Planet Labs (PL) shares jumped over 7% on Monday after the firm secured a multi-year low 9-figure agreement with the Swedish Armed Forces to deliver a suite of satellites, space-based data, and awareness solutions.
  • In the last year, Planet Labs has signed over half a billion dollars across three satellite services contracts, supporting the national security needs of Japan via JSAT and in collaboration with Germany.
  • Through the multi-year contract, Sweden will own a suite of Planet’s satellites, and have access to its high-resolution data, and intelligence solutions.

data.title: CVRx reports preliminary 2025 results, issues 2026 guidance
data.description:
• CVRx (CVRX) on Monday said that preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 revenue is expected to be $15.9 million to $16.1 million, up 4% to 5% from the same period in 2024.
  • Full year revenue expected to be $56.5 million to $56.7 million, representing growth of 10% to 11%.
  • The company reported 252 active implanting centers as of December 31, 2025, up from 250 at the end of September, and 53 U.S. sales territories, up three from the prior quarter.
  • Cash and cash equivalents were $75.7 million.
  • For fiscal 2026, CVRx expects total revenue of $63 million to $67 million, gross margin of 84% to 86%, and operating expenses of $103 million to $107 million.
  • First-quarter 2026 revenue is expected to be $13.7 million to $14.7 million.
  • Concensus for 2025 EPS is $-2.03 and revenue of $56.13M.
  • The company also said that the FDA has approved the BENEFIT-HF trial design in November 2025 and it has applied to CMS for coverage. 
  • CVRx also amended its debt facility to extend the maturity to 2031 and increase available funds to $100 million, drawing $10 million at closing.
  • CVRX -0.86% premarket to $8.04.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Stock market opens in red amid Powell investigation
data.description:
Wall Street fell on Monday amid news that the U.S. attorney’s office has launched a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.

S&P 500 (SP500) -0.4%, the Dow (DJI) -0.6%, and the Nasdaq Composite (COMP:IND) -0.4%.

The investigation reportedly centers on the central bank’s renovation of its Washington headquarters and whether Powell lied to Congress about the project’s scope, according to the New York Times.

Powell released an extraordinary statement, asserting that grand jury subpoenas served by the Department of Justice are not about legitimate legal concerns but rather punishment for the central bank’s refusal to set interest rates according to President Donald Trump’s preferences.

Treasury yields were mixed across the curve. The U.S. 2-year Treasury yield (US2Y) rose slightly to 3.56%. The benchmark 10-year Treasury yield (US10Y) rose to 4.20%, adding 2 basis points. The 30-year Treasury yield (US30Y) climbed to 4.85%, up 3 basis points.

data.title: Veracyte reports Q4 preliminary revenue in the range of $138M - $140M
data.description:
• Veracyte (VCYT) said on Monday that it expects to report Q4 total revenue between $138M and $140M, an increase of between 16% and 18%.
  • It sees testing revenue between $134M and $136M and testing volume of ~45,500.
  • For the full year ended Veracyte expects to report total revenue between $515M and $517M.
  • Testing revenue of between $491m and $493M for the year and testing volume of ~169,700, an increase of 19%.
  • Additionally, Veracyte expects to report adjusted EBITDA margin of greater than 25% for the full year ended December 31, 2025.
  • Veracyte initiated 2026 total revenue guidance of 10% to 13% growth, or $570 million to $582 million, with testing revenue guidance of 14% to 16% growth, or $559 million to $569 million, excluding the contribution from new tests. Further, 2026 adjusted EBITDA margin is expected to be 25%.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Medtronic gains FDA clearance for MiniMed Go insulin dosing system app
data.description:
• The US FDA has granted 510(k) clearance to Medtronic (MDT) for its MiniMed Go app that is used with the MiniMed Go Smart Multiple Daily Injection (MDI) system.
  • MiniMed Go integrates the InPen smart insulin pen and the Instinct sensor manufactured by Abbott (ABT) through the MiniMed Go app providing real-time glucose data, dose calculations, missed dose alerts, and actionable guidance.

data.title: OneSpaWorld lowers Q4, FY25 revenue outlook, sets preliminary FY26 view
data.description:
Following the competed reorganization of its UK and Italian operations, OneSpaWorld Holdings (OSW) revised its revenue and profit guidance of the fourth quarter and fiscal year and issued preliminary FY26 guidance.

"We ended 2025 with exceptional onboard performance for our New Year’s cruises and we begin 2026 strongly positioned, expecting continued momentum, as we advance growth initiatives, deliver innovative products and services, provide exceptional passenger experiences, and operate additional health and wellness centers on new ship builds,” CEO Leonard Fluxman said in a statement.

The company – which provides spa services at resorts and aboard cruise ships – now expects fourth quarter revenue to be within a range of $239.5M and $244.5M (versus $244.5M estimates), down from the prior range of $241M and $246M. This represents 11% growth at the midpoint of Q4 2024 revenue.

Adjusted EBITDA is still expected to be within the range of $30M to $32M, representing growth of 16% year-over-year.

For FY25, OneSpaWorld (OSW) anticipates revenue to be within a range of $958.5M and $963.5M with a midpoint of $961M that is below the $963.25M estimate, and was lowered from $960M to $965M, previously.

Adjusted EBITDA remains unchanged tat $122M to $124M, representing growth of 10% year-over-year.

Excluding $23M in revenue expected to be generated by its UK and Italian reorganizations and the completed exit of its land-based health and wellness center operations in Asia, OneSpaWorld (OSW) is forecasting FY26 revenue to be within $1.01B and $1.03B, below the $1.04B consensus estimate.

Adjusted EBITDA is not expected to be impacted by the business reorganization and is still seen to be within $129M and $138M.

data.title: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals reports prelim 2025 ORLADEYO revenue, provides 2026 guidance
data.description:
• BioCryst Pharmaceuticals (BCRX) reported preliminary, unaudited Q4 2025 ORLADEYO net revenue of $151M, up 22% Y/Y.
  • Full-year 2025 ORLADEYO revenue reached $601M, a 37% increase Y/Y.
  • BioCryst expects 2026 global ORLADEYO revenue of $625M–645M and total revenue, including RAPIVAB®, of $635M–660M.
  • Year-end 2025 cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash, and investments totaled ~$338M.
  • Astria acquisition, expected to close in Q1 2026, will add $70M–80M in additional operating expenses to support Phase 3 enrollment of navenibart and commercial readiness.

data.title: Synchrony expands CareCredit to health and wellness providers through the Clover app
data.description:
• Synchrony (SYF) on Monday announced an expansion of its integration with Clover, the all-in-one commerce solution from Fiserv (FISV).
  • The partnership expands CareCredit's network with an additional 40,000 health providers, in addition to the 2,000 health & wellness providers already accepting CareCredit payments with Clover.
  • Synchrony (SYF) fell 9%, tracking the broader market decline.

data.title: Silver spikes as safe-haven demand jumps on Powell investigation
data.description:
Silver (XAGUSD:CUR) spiked higher on Monday morning climbing to yet another all-time trading high after reports that the U.S. attorney’s office has opened a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.

To start the trading week, investors watched silver surge sharply, jumping about 6% in early Monday trading and briefly climbing as high as 7.3% at its peak. 

Silver’s upward momentum has carried into 2026, showing little sign of easing after a standout performance in 2025, when the precious metal surged by roughly 150% for the year. Less than a month into the new year, silver has already added another 18.4%, extending its year-to-date gains and underscoring the strength of the ongoing rally. 

Speaking on the behalf of silver, Seeking Alpha analyst David Desjardins said: “It is my personal view that silver is currently in the midst of a generational bull market underpinned by structural industrial demand growth.” 

For investors looking to track the price of silver they can look to monitor both silver and silver mining exchange trade funds. Outlined below are a group of related funds: 

Silver ETFs: (SLV), (SIVR), (AGQ), (ZSL), and (PSLV). 

Silver Mining ETFs: (SIL), (SILJ), (SLVP), (SHNY), and (SLJY).

data.title: Sekur Private Data launches $1.05M non-brokered private placement
data.description:
• Sekur Private Data (SWISF) announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to CA$1.5M (US$1.05M) through the issuance of up to 30M units.
  • Each unit consists of one common share at CA$0.05 and one full warrant, exercisable at CA$0.10 per share for 48 months.
  • Net proceeds are intended to fund sales, business development, and general working capital.
